# DATPAQ Working Days API Sample

This repository contains a production-ready React single-page application demonstrating the DATPAQ Working Days API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://www.datpaq.com/docs/working-days
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- API route used by this sample: POST /v1/working-days/calculate
- Machine-readable OpenAPI schema: /openapi.json
- Machine-readable app metadata: /openai.json
- Expanded LLM guidance: /llms-full.txt

## What this app demonstrates
- Working-day counts between two dates.
- Forward and backward business-day offsets from a base date.
- Region-aware holiday exclusions for US, DE, and IN.
- Optional custom holidays, custom date formats, and include-start behavior.
- Loading, error, empty, and success states.
- Copyable request URL, request JSON, and response JSON.

## Auth expectations
- Requires an API key in the `x-api-key` request header.

## Request contract
- Method: `POST`
- Path: `/v1/working-days/calculate`
- Required: `start_date`
- Range mode: provide `end_date`
- Offset mode: provide `days_offset` and optionally `direction`

## Output contract
- Successful responses include `success`, `data`, `meta`, and `correlationId`.
- Typical single-result fields include `data.working_days`, `data.start_date`, `data.end_date`, `data.region`, and `data.holidays_used`.
